# Support

## Getting help

- **Documentation** — See the [README](../README.md) for setup and usage guides.
- **Bug reports** — Open a [bug report](https://github.com/PawelGawlikDev/chess-app/issues/new?template=bug_report.md).
- **Feature requests** — Open a [feature request](https://github.com/PawelGawlikDev/chess-app/issues/new?template=feature_request.md).
- **Discussions** — Ask questions or start a discussion on [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/PawelGawlikDev/chess-app/discussions).
- **Security issues** — Report privately per our [Security Policy](../SECURITY.md).

## Before opening an issue

1. Check the [existing issues](https://github.com/PawelGawlikDev/chess-app/issues) and [discussions](https://github.com/PawelGawlikDev/chess-app/discussions).
2. Search for related questions — your problem may already have an answer.
3. Provide clear reproduction steps and environment details.
